## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss concerns and details about implementing growthx.ai's content creation services for Fieldguide.](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fieldguide's main concerns: content accuracy in a trust-based industry and efficiency of the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [growthx.ai uses fact-checker agents and client review to ensure accuracy; 10+ publish-ready articles expected by week 4-6 of Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [growthx.ai maintains a strict 12-month commitment for Phase 2, with quarterly billing option available](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Fieldguide received finance approval for budget increase, decision pending internal alignment](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

## Topics

### Content Accuracy Concerns

  - [Industry built on trust; misinformation risks damaging credibility](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [growthx.ai's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
      - [Fact-checker agent workflow: deep research against credible sources for every passage](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - [Client team review before staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [No specific data on judge activity or edit frequency available](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Content Creation Efficiency

  - [Concern: extensive rewrites could negate time-saving benefits](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Unclear current efficiency (60% vs. 90% ready)](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Real assessment possible only after trial period](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### Phase 1 Content Production Timeline

  - [Content production typically starts in second half of Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [For motivated clients like Fieldguide: as early as week 4](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Target: \~10 publish-ready articles before week 7](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Flexible based on client needs (e.g., 15-20 articles if required for confident decision-making)](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Phase 2 Commitment and Terms

  - [growthx.ai maintains strict 12-month commitment for Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [High demand for available slots (10+ clients for mid-November dates)](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Quarterly billing option confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Tyler emphasized importance of client confidence in organic growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Fieldguide's Internal Decision-Making

  - [Finance approval received for budget increase](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Final decision pending alignment between Jenny, Yasine, and Mark](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Commitment to provide go/no-go decision to growthx.ai early next week](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### growthx.ai's Positioning

  - [Presented as best partner for creating content to appear in AI answers at scale](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Referenced town.com as example of successful implementation with similar accuracy requirements](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenny and Yasine to discuss internally immediately after the call](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Send recommendation to Mark via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Provide go/no-go decision to growthx.ai early next week](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [If proceeding, prepare for potential October 20th start date](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [If needed, email additional questions to growthx.ai team (copy Marcel for quicker responses)](https://fathom.video/share/fZuVizoEGr1dzxNVBjpCXcLxdwDSoagx?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
